context: Go 1.24 with Charmbracelet TUI (bubbletea v1.3.10, bubbles v0.21.0, lipgloss v1.1.0), gofrs/flock for file locking. Top-level packages: main.go entry, internal/ with prd, runner, workflow, config, tui, prompt, args, cli, logger, status, constants. Test runner: 'go test ./...'. Uses interfaces for Runner (RunnerInterface) and Cmd (CmdInterface), bubble tea for TUI. PRD is loaded/saved via prd.Load() and prd.Save() in internal/prd/storage.go. Story structure in internal/prd/types.go with fields: ID, Title, Description, AcceptanceCriteria, Priority, DependsOn, Passes, RetryCount. Config loads test_command from RALPH_TEST_COMMAND env var, defaults to 'go test ./...'.
test_spec: 1) Run 'go test ./...' and verify returns exit code 0 after story completion even when passes:true in PRD. 2) When tests fail (exit code != 0), verify story is marked passes:false and git state rolled back. 3) When user edits prd.json and enters 'resume' or equivalent, implementation loop starts with modified stories. 4) Verify no test execution happens if story already passes:true from previous run. 5) Verify test verification works after retries - tests must pass on retry to mark story done.

stories.title: Add TestCommand field to Config
stories.description: Add test_command field to internal/config/config.go Config struct. Load from RALPH_TEST_COMMAND env var with default 'go test ./...'. Add validation to ensure non-empty.
acceptance_criteria: config.Load() returns Config with test_command='go test ./...' when env not set
config.Load() returns Config with test_command='go test -v ./internal/...' when RALPH_TEST_COMMAND='go test -v ./internal/...'
config_test.go has test for test_command field loading

stories.title: Add runTests function to workflow package
stories.description: Create runTests function in internal/workflow/workflow.go that executes test_command from config and returns (success bool, output string, error). Use exec.Command to run the test command, return exit code as success/failure.
acceptance_criteria: runTests returns (true, output, nil) when test_command exits with code 0
runTests returns (false, output, error) when test_command exits with non-zero code

stories.title: Integrate test verification in story execution
stories.description: Modify internal/workflow/workflow.go ExecuteStory method (around line 343) to call runTests() after story completes but before checking passes flag. If tests fail and passes is true, roll back and mark failed. If tests pass and passes is false (AI made mistake), still roll back for retry - tests are source of truth.
acceptance_criteria: When passes:true but tests fail (exit != 0), story marked passes:false with retry_count incremented
When passes:true and tests pass (exit 0), story marked passes:true (unchanged)
When passes:false but tests pass (exit 0), roll back and retry (treat as AI under-reported)
Git state rolled back after failed test verification

stories.title: Add PRD review prompt after generation
stories.description: Modify internal/cli/cli.go or internal/tui to add an interactive prompt after PRD is generated but before implementation loop starts. Present 'Review PRD' option that allows user to edit prd.json in editor ($EDITOR or default) or review in TUI before proceeding.
acceptance_criteria: After PRD generation, user is prompted to review before implementation
User can open prd.json in $EDITOR and save to modify stories
'Proceed without changes' option continues to implementation loop
TUI shows all stories with priority, dependencies, acceptance criteria before starting

stories.title: Add dry-run stops at PRD review step
stories.description: When --dry-run flag is provided, the flow should stop at PRD review step (not enter implementation loop). User can edit and review, then manually run --resume to proceed.
acceptance_criteria: 'go run . "feature" --dry-run' stops after PRD review prompt
User can review PRD and exit editor without changes
Dry-run output shows 'PRD ready for review' message
